chapter_title.ar: باب الْأَكْلِ وَ الشُّرْبِ فِي آنِيَةِ الذَّهَبِ وَ الْفِضَّةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 19 – Eating and drinking in a vessel of the gold and the silver

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/68)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/68)
text: آنِيَةُ الذَّهَبِ وَ الْفِضَّةِ مَتَاعُ الَّذِينَ لَا يُوقِنُونَ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ali Bin Hassan, from Musa Bin Bakr,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan Musa<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The vessels of gold and silver are belongings of those who have no conviction’.
en.sarwar: 7. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Ali ibn Hassan from Musa ibn Bakr who has said the following: “Abu al-Hassan, Musa, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Utensils of gold and silver are of the assets of those who do not have certainty (in the laws of Allah).”’
